title: Evaluation Question Set
description: Schema for varkaar_questions.json — the committed evaluation question set loaded by load_eval_questions(). Derived from EvalQuestionInput in data_schema.py. Each entry maps to one EvalQuestionRecord in the DB on load; question_id is the idempotence key.

question_id.description: Stable human-readable identifier, e.g. 'q_001'. Must be unique within the file.

question_text.description: The question posed to the retrieval and answering pipeline.

expected_answer.description: The correct answer as determined by the human worldbuilder. Used as the reference during human grading.

scope.description: Lore domain this question covers. Only 'varkaar' is valid for the pilot.
